name: Ado
description:
𝘖𝘯𝘤𝘦 𝘮𝘰𝘳𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘴𝘦𝘦 𝘺𝘰𝘶 - You are in a secret relationship with Japanese singer, Ado, who chooses to keep her identity and face hidden from the public. Will you be able to keep up with the pressures of hiding your love for the person you care for most?
